warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: with a buddy
200m jog together
10 worlds greatest stretch
5 Cossack squats per side
10 Ring Rows
10 air squats
6 DB snatch
6 V-ups or Tuck Sits

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
rest 3 mins
AMRAP x 12 minutes
6 Power Snatches @ 60/40kg
6 HSPU
150m Row

hypertrophy.reasoning: Power snatches and HSPU heavily tax shoulders, triceps, and quads; accessory work targets antagonists and neglected posterior chain.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Metcon: AMRAP 3 minutes: 6 Power Snatches @ 60/40kg, 6 HSPU, 150m Row. For hypertrophy, focus on biceps, rear delts, hamstrings.
